results.text: Ethan Belchetz - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Playmaking is at the centre of his game. Belchetz builds plays with a collection of short passes, taking pucks off the wall in the defensive zone, bumping them to accelerating teammates, and then drawing give-and-goes and tic-tac-toe plays in transition. Ethan Belchetz Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Ethan Belchetz, a hockey player from Oakville, ONT born Mar 30 2008 who was active from 2023 to 2026.
